name: Vex'd
description: '''Vex'd''' were an English [[dubstep]] duo that consisted of [[Kuedo|Jamie Teasdale]] and [[Roly Porter]]. They often played at early [[Digital Mystikz|DMZ]] nights and were some of the early pioneers of the genre. The duo released their first album ''Degenerate'' in 2005, and disbanded in 2007 after the duo moved out to different countries. Their second album ''Cloud Seed'' featured unfinished songs from 2006 and 2007 that was eventually released in 2010 by [[Planet Mu]].
